violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. There was no certified manager, or certificate, available for the establishment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The handle for the top door of the bread cabinet needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A container with plastic portion cup lids was stored directly under the front hand soap dispenser.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
